examples: Besides, he has no proof that the allegations are true; Washington is full of scuttlebutt.
Now I've heard a lot of scuttlebutt about a food shortage.
The scuttlebutt in the office is that Tom is going to be fired.
They don't know too much about actually what's going on other than scuttlebutt and what they've heard.
The scuttlebutt is that Sinofsky is going to show a preview of Windows 8.
